zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Fowler於1448年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾格亞特 哈瑟利時，她的父親Richard Fowler28歲，母親Joan d'Anvers26歲。她和Richard Chamberlain至少有9個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1525年在英國奧可福爾爾本享年77歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾爾本。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Fowler was born in 1448, in Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Fowler, was 28 and her mother, Joan d'Anvers, was 26. She had at least 9 sons and 1 daughter with Richard Chamberlain. She died in 1525, in Shirburn, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Shirburn, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil Fowler est née en 1448, à Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Fowler, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan d'Anvers, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille avec Richard Chamberlain. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Shirburn, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Shirburn, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England: Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil Fowler 1448 in Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Fowler 28 und ihre Mutter Joan d'Anvers 26. Sie hatte mit Richard Chamberlain mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1525 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Shirburn, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Shirburn, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil Fowlerが1448年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアグレアト ハセリーで生まれた時，父Richard Fowlerは28歳，母Joan d'Anversは26歳であった。彼女はRichard Chamberlainとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1525年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイルブルンで77歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイルブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Fowler(이)가 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 그리트 하셀이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Fowler(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan d'Anvers(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Richard Chamberlain(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 스퍼드실르 실르번에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 실르번에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Fowler родилась в 1448 г. в местности грит хеисели, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Fowler было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan d'Anvers, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь от Richard Chamberlain. Она умерла в 1525 г. в местности ширбурн, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности ширбурн, оксфордшир, Англия.
